reason: This is a common Islamic prayer asking for paradise, using standard religious language without any extremist content or ISIS-specific rhetoric
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: اللهم اجعل الجنه دارنا ..اللهم انا نسألك رضاك و الجنه ..اللهم انا نسألك ما يقرب لها من قول و عمل 396
